author: nitsan
text:
very cool, let's combine with zoom and collapse, let's make it a bit more complete
also - in outline let's not show the connectoing lines

author: claude
text: Combined — refresh: connectors are gone in outline (they fade in with the morph, fully there by t≈0.4), zoom is integrated in both projections (Enter dives, Esc backs out, breadcrumb + title), fog-of-war shows children full / grandchildren faint / deeper hidden, tree grown to ~36 nodes. The compose move: zoom into a node, press m — its subtree blooms into a local mind-map around it as the hub. Known rough edge: diving while in map mode makes the wires snap while nodes glide.
